items.title: Copy of UCL talking points: Are PSG favorites? Arsenal rig...
items.summary: What to make of a 5-4 humdinger and a nervy 1-1 draw? ESPN's Julien Laurens, Mark Ogden, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on all the moments that mattered from the UCL semifi...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Saudi Arabia to pull LIV Golf funding after 2026 season: PGA Tour CEO cites 'scar tissue' with star players
items.summary: After sinking billions into creating a circuit to rival the PGA Tour, the Public Investment Fund will reportedly cut ties with LIV Golf
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Queensland joins NSW in rejecting CA's BBL privatisation plan
items.summary: It leaves CA with only four states, who control five BBL clubs, in favour of moving to the next phase of privatisation
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
